blueprint.honesty: Descriptive: the shape champions SHARED, not a recipe to win. n=16, so goalie luck and playoff variance matter -- read the IQR band, not just the median. Dimensions are within-season percentiles (era-neutral); traits are raw. We profile WINNERS (survivorship) -- the runner-up contrast shows how little separated them from the team they beat.
